task: Add hover-hold tooltip showing 'Ctrl + B' to sidebar toggle button using existing global React Tooltip pattern

key_reasoning.reason: Single button element in SidebarToggle.tsx. No cross-layer coordination, no architectural impact.

All criteria defined: add 'Ctrl + B' tooltip using data-attribute pattern. Exact implementation pattern documented and used in 30+ existing components (ChatHeaderClearButton, ChatHeaderBrowseFilesButton, ChatHeaderShareButton, etc.).

Identical pattern exists throughout codebase. Global tooltip infrastructure already initialized in main.tsx and tooltip.ts. No performance/security implications. Single attribute addition is trivial to roll back.
1 file modified (SidebarToggle.tsx). 0 new files. Change fully localized to button element attributes.
